item.title: 2023 年 10 家最佳 Ionic 移动应用程序开发公司 | 10 Best Ionic Mobile App Development Firms in 2023
item.description:
程序员新闻

发表于 2 月 11 日


它于 2013 年推出，从那时起，它已被开发人员广泛用于创建可在 Android 和 iOS 平台上运行的高质量移动应用程序。

总的来说，Ionic 是一个用于构建跨平台移动应用程序的多功能且强大的框架。 它允许开发人员使用他们已经熟悉的网络技术快速高效地创建高质量的移动应用程序。

您在寻找 2023 年的 Ionic 移动应用程序开发公司吗？ 那就别再看了 **Codersnews **帮助您找到2023 年 10 家最佳 Ionic 移动应用程序开发公司名单。

他们是一家领先的 Ionic 移动应用程序开发公司，为全球客户提供高质量的移动应用程序开发服务。

他们的主要优势之一是能够了解每个客户的独特需求并提供满足其特定需求的定制移动应用程序解决方案。

无论您是想构建新的 Ionic 移动应用程序还是增强现有应用程序，他们都是帮助您实现目标的理想合作伙伴。

永恒的开发帖子...

我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

它不是 Python 或 HTML。

它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

一旦暂停，codersnews 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，codersnews 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，codersnews 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 codersnews 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 codersnews：

降低 codersnews 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 codersnews 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

CodersNews

Posted on Feb 11


Ionic is a popular open-source framework for building cross-platform mobile applications using web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It was introduced in 2013 and since then, it has been widely used by developers to create high-quality mobile applications that run on both Android and iOS platforms.

Overall, Ionic is a versatile and powerful framework for building cross-platform mobile applications. It allows developers to use web technologies they are already familiar with to create high-quality mobile apps quickly and efficiently.

Ionic is a fantastic option for your next project, regardless of if you are an experienced developer or are just getting started with mobile app development.

Are you searching for Ionic Mobile App Development Firms in 2023? then look no further **Codersnews **helps you find a list of 10 Best Ionic Mobile App Development Firms in 2023.

They are a leading Ionic mobile app development company that provides high-quality mobile app development services to clients across the globe.

One of the key strengths of them is their ability to understand the unique requirements of each client and deliver customized mobile app solutions that meet their specific needs.

Whether you are looking to build a new Ionic mobile app or enhance an existing one, They are the ideal partner to help you achieve your goals.

Timeless DEV post...

Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

It's not Python or HTML.

It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

Once suspended, codersnews will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, codersnews will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by codersnews will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If codersnews is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag codersnews:

Make all posts by codersnews less visible

codersnews consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging codersnews will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: codersnews

item.title: 连接到 GitHub 和获取搜索结果的 Python 脚本 | A Python Script to connect to GitHub and Fetches Search Results
item.description:
阿吉特·辛格·雷纳

发表于 2 月 11 日

它允许开发人员以编程方式访问平台的各个方面，例如管理存储库、管理用户和管理问题。

可以使用个人访问令牌、OAuth2 或基本身份验证来完成身份验证。 此外，还有许多以不同编程语言提供的客户端库，这使得与 API 的集成变得更加容易，并减少了您需要编写的代码量。

以下是从 GitHub 获取搜索结果的示例 Python 脚本。 请注意，您将需要个人帐户令牌才能使其正常工作：

 import requests import json url = "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=docker+desktop+extension&sort=stars&order=desc" headers = { "Authorization": "github_pat_XXXX" } response = requests.get(url, headers=headers) if response.status_code == 200: data = json.loads(response.text) for repository in data["items"]: print(f"{repository['name']}: {repository['html_url']}") else: print("Could not retrieve data from GitHub.")

在此脚本中，您需要替换为实际的 GitHub 个人访问令牌。 令牌作为授权标头在请求标头中传递。 这允许脚本访问您的 GitHub 帐户中受保护的资源，例如搜索存储库。

获取每个存储库的链接并将其与存储库名称一起添加到输出中，以冒号 (:) 分隔。

 python3 new.py docker-php-extension-installer: https://github.com/mlocati/docker-php-extension-installer codechecker: https://github.com/Ericsson/codechecker SingleFileZ: https://github.com/gildas-lormeau/SingleFileZ china-dictatorship: https://github.com/cirosantilli/china-dictatorship vscode-docker: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-docker flask-bones: https://github.com/cburmeister/flask-bones ProjectFib: https://github.com/anantdgoel/ProjectFib S3Mock: https://github.com/adobe/S3Mock home: https://github.com/gege-circle/home docker-php: https://github.com/chialab/docker-php dockbix-xxl: https://github.com/monitoringartist/dockbix-xxl wind-layer: https://github.com/sakitam-fdd/wind-layer powerstrip: https://github.com/ClusterHQ/powerstrip selenium-jupiter: https://github.com/bonigarcia/selenium-jupiter gnome-shell-extension-docker: https://github.com/gpouilloux/gnome-shell-extension-docker hacktoberfest-2022: https://github.com/docker/hacktoberfest-2022 azure-docker-extension: https://github.com/Azure/azure-docker-extension pgrocks-fdw: https://github.com/vidardb/pgrocks-fdw docker-php-yii2: https://github.com/dmstr/docker-php-yii2 docker-community-extensions: https://github.com/collabnix/docker-community-extensions alpine-php-fpm: https://github.com/joseluisq/alpine-php-fpm autoview-tradingview-chrome-docker-bot: https://github.com/IAMtheIAM/autoview-tradingview-chrome-docker-bot .config: https://github.com/zszszszsz/.config docker-phpfpm: https://github.com/adhocore/docker-phpfpm coc-docker: https://github.com/josa42/coc-docker china-dictatorhsip-6: https://github.com/cirosantilli/china-dictatorhsip-6 testcontainers-spock: https://github.com/testcontainers/testcontainers-spock Dockery: https://github.com/oslabs-beta/Dockery docker-extension: https://github.com/tailscale/docker-extension volumes-backup-extension: https://github.com/docker/volumes-backup-extension ajeetraina@Docker-Ajeet-Singh-Rainas-MacBook-Pro chatgpt % vi new.py ajeetraina@Docker-Ajeet-Singh-Rainas-MacBook-Pro chatgpt % python3 new.py .config: https://github.com/zszszszsz/.config Dockery: https://github.com/oslabs-beta/Dockery docker-extension: https://github.com/tailscale/docker-extension ransomware: https://github.com/abhir98/ransomware jfrog-docker-desktop-extension: https://github.com/jfrog/jfrog-docker-desktop-extension dd-extension-lgtm: https://github.com/cedricziel/dd-extension-lgtm openshift-dd-ext: https://github.com/redhat-developer/openshift-dd-ext k9s-dd-extension: https://github.com/spurin/k9s-dd-extension pgadmin4-docker-extension: https://github.com/marcelo-ochoa/pgadmin4-docker-extension trivy-docker-extension: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy-docker-extension drone-ci-docker-extension: https://github.com/harness/drone-ci-docker-extension docker-extension: https://github.com/loopDelicious/docker-extension swagger-editor-docker-extension: https://github.com/n-murphy/swagger-editor-docker-extension wasm-docker-extension: https://github.com/cmrigney/wasm-docker-extension microcks-docker-desktop-extension: https://github.com/microcks/microcks-docker-desktop-extension docker-extension-golang-playground: https://github.com/rumpl/docker-extension-golang-playground diveintoansible-extension: https://github.com/spurin/diveintoansible-extension docker-desktop-extension: https://github.com/okteto/docker-desktop-extension docker-extension-rabbitmq: https://github.com/Yogendra0Sharma/docker-extension-rabbitmq docker-storj-extension: https://github.com/elek/docker-storj-extension github-registry-docker-desktop-extension: https://github.com/peacecwz/github-registry-docker-desktop-extension docker-desktop-extension-issues: https://github.com/mutagen-io/docker-desktop-extension-issues sdw-docker-extension: https://github.com/marcelo-ochoa/sdw-docker-extension vcluster-dd-extension: https://github.com/loft-sh/vcluster-dd-extension extension-docker-desktop: https://github.com/epinio/extension-docker-desktop asyncapi-studio-docker-extension: https://github.com/thiyagu06/asyncapi-studio-docker-extension gefyra-docker-desktop-extension: https://github.com/gefyrahq/gefyra-docker-desktop-extension oraclexe-docker-extension: https://github.com/marcelo-ochoa/oraclexe-docker-extension docker-extensions-101: https://github.com/collabnix/docker-extensions-101 step-ca-docker-extension: https://github.com/hslatman/step-ca-docker-extension

一旦暂停，ajeetraina 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，ajeetraina 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ajeetraina 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ajeetraina 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 ajeetraina：

使 ajeetraina 的所有帖子不那么显眼

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ajeetraina 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ajeet Singh Raina

Posted on Feb 11

The GitHub API is a RESTful API for interacting with the GitHub platform. It allows developers to programmatically access various aspects of the platform, such as managing repositories, managing users, and managing issues.

The API supports a variety of methods for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting resources, making it a powerful tool for automating various tasks and integrating with other systems. The API requires authentication for all methods except for those that are publicly accessible. The authentication can be done using a personal access token, OAuth2, or with basic authentication. GitHub provides extensive documentation for its API, making it easy to get started and use.

Additionally, there are many client libraries available in different programming languages, which makes it easier to integrate with the API and reduces the amount of code you need to write.

Here is a sample Python script that fetches search results from GitHub. Please note that you will require Personal Account Token to get it working:

import requests
import json

url = "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=docker+desktop+extension&sort=stars&order=desc"

headers = {
    "Authorization": "github_pat_XXXX"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = json.loads(response.text)
    for repository in data["items"]:
        print(f"{repository['name']}: {repository['html_url']}")
else:
    print("Could not retrieve data from GitHub.")

In this script, you'll need to replace with your actual GitHub personal access token. The token is passed in the request headers as an Authorization header. This allows the script to access protected resources in your GitHub account, such as searching for repositories.

The link to each repository is fetched and added to the output along with the repository name, separated by a colon (:).

python3 new.py 
docker-php-extension-installer: https://github.com/mlocati/docker-php-extension-installer

item.title: Excel 迷你图 | Excel Sparklines
item.description:
如何在 Ex 中乘以一列

发表于 2 月 11 日

凭借其强大的公式、图表、数据透视表和宏，Excel Power 使用户能够处理预算、预测、跟踪绩效数据等任何任务。 此外，它还是快速增长的协作工作空间的关键部分，您的团队可以在其中进行实时交互——使数据共享变得简单和无缝。

永恒的开发帖子...

我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

它不是 Python 或 HTML。

它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

一旦被暂停，bizinfographca 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

解除暂停后，bizinfographca 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，bizinfographca 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 bizinfographca 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 bizinfographca 的方法：

降低 bizinfographca 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 bizinfographca 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

How To Multiply A Column in Ex

Posted on Feb 11

Excel Proper enables you to create a wide range of data analysis tools for managing and communicating information. With its powerful formulas, charts, pivot tables and macros, Excel Power enables users to handle any task from budgeting, forecasting, tracking performance data and more. Additionally it is a key part of the fast-growing collaborative workspace where your team can interact in real time -- making data sharing simple and seamless.

Timeless DEV post...

Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

It's not Python or HTML.

It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

Once suspended, bizinfographca will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, bizinfographca will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by bizinfographca will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If bizinfographca is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 答案：在 app.config 中使用名称 connectionStrings 用于 Scaffold-DbContext EF 6 命令 | Answer: Use name connectionStrings in app.config for Scaffold-DbContext EF 6 command
item.description:
沙菲克·乌尔·拉赫曼

发表于 2 月 11 日

就我而言（VS2022，.NET 6），我也遇到了同样的问题，并通过以下方式获得了解决方案；

  1. 在 appsettings.json 文件中添加了连接字符串（附截图）
  2. 运行命令：PM> Scaffold-DbContext name=StudentDbConnectionString TrustServerCertificate=true;" Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer -OutputDir Models
  3. 它生成了相关的 DbContext 文件（附截图）
  4. 在program.cs中的Builder.Services中手动注册DbContext...

永恒的开发帖子...

我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

它不是 Python 或 HTML。

它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

医学博士。 贾希德·侯赛因 - 2 月 10 日

暂停后，srplanta 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停解除。

解除暂停后，srplanta 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，srplanta 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 srplanta 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 srplanta：

降低 srplanta 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 srplanta 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Shafiq Ur Rehman

Posted on Feb 11

In my case (VS2022, .NET 6) I also encountered the same problem n got solution in following way;

  1. Added Connection String in appsettings.json file (Screenshot attached)
  2. Ran the command: PM> Scaffold-DbContext name=StudentDbConnectionString TrustServerCertificate=true;" Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer -OutputDir Models
  3. It generated relevant DbContext file (Screenshot attached)
  4. Manually registered DbContext in Builder.Services in program.cs…

Timeless DEV post...

Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

It's not Python or HTML.

It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

Aditya Priyadarshi - Feb 10

MD. JAHID HOSSAIN - Feb 10

Once suspended, srplanta will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, srplanta will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by srplanta will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If srplanta is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag srplanta:

Make all posts by srplanta less visible

srplanta consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging srplanta will restore default visibility to their posts.
